spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(node) && valid(talloc) && valid_range(galloc->bufts, 0, galloc->n_bufs) && (talloc->buffer_id < 0 || (talloc->buffer_id >= 0 && talloc->buffer_id < galloc->n_bufs)) && talloc->size_max >= 0
spec.postcondition: (ensures (result == true) implies (talloc->size_max >= node_size_for(node, galloc, talloc)) && (result == false) implies (talloc->buffer_id < 0 && node->data == null && node->view_src == null)) && (result == (talloc->buffer_id < 0 && node->data == NULL && node->view_src == NULL ? false : talloc->size_max >= (node->data == NULL && node->view_src == NULL ? ggml_backend_buft_get_alloc_size(galloc->bufts[talloc->buffer_id], node) : 0)))
